title: La segretaria privata
writer: István Békeffy, István Szomaházy, Franz Schulz
actors: Elsa Merlini, Nino Besozzi, Sergio Tofano
plot: During hard times, a vivacious girl looks for an office job in the hope of landing a rich man.The director of the bank she works at flirts with her while not at first revealing his identity so she rejects him.
